archetype.rationale: €185 tasting menu, reservation required, single seating, reviews describe occasion dining and advance booking — premium restrained experience.

runner_up_rejected.name: EXPERIENCE DRIVEN
runner_up_rejected.reason: Experience is present, but price level and reservation-only model place this firmly in luxury.

customer_type.evidence: Claire D. review — reservation three months out

main_selling_point.value: Seven-course seasonal tasting with a signature langoustine course

competitive_advantage.value: Single-seating format with invisible, precise service

design_direction.tone: Restrained and precise — let the courses speak
design_direction.color: Near-black and warm ivory — no bright accents
design_direction.layout_rhythm: Slow scroll, generous whitespace, four items max in menu
design_direction.imagery_priority: Plated courses and salon over crowd shots
